codeReview.summary: Inline editing works for core click/edit/save/cancel flows, validation, drag isolation, and cross-view store updates, but two explicit requirements are not met: Tab does not advance to the next editable field, and level is not editable on OrgChart employee cards.

issues.description: Tab handling calls `e.preventDefault()` and relies on `onTab`, but parent handlers are no-ops, so focus does not advance to the next editable field. This violates the required behavior "Tab moves to next editable field".
The OrgChart employee card renders `level` as static text/badge instead of an inline-editable control, so one required field (name/title/department/level) is not directly editable in OrgChartView.

summary: Feature review result: fail. The implementation is substantial and well-tested at component level, but it does not satisfy two required behaviors: Tab-based progression between editable fields and level inline editing on OrgChart cards.
